description: Exports Events and Telemetry as OpenTelemetry log records to an OTLP-compatible collector

endpoint.title: Collector Endpoint
endpoint.description: OTLP gRPC collector endpoint. Leave empty to use OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT env var.

serviceName.title: Service Name
serviceName.description: Identifies this source in the collector

events.title: Export Events
events.description: Export flight software events as log records (e.g. to Loki)

telemetry.title: Export Telemetry
telemetry.description: Export channelized telemetry as metrics (e.g. to Prometheus)
